aggregateRating.ratingValue: REPLACE_WITH_REAL_AVERAGE — do not estimate or invent this number
aggregateRating.reviewCount: REPLACE_WITH_REAL_COUNT — do not estimate or invent this number

reviewRating.ratingValue: REPLACE — real value from an actual review

author.name: REPLACE — real reviewer name or verified initials, with their consent

review.reviewBody: REPLACE — the real review text, quoted accurately, not paraphrased or invented
review.datePublished: REPLACE — the real date that review was left
